content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape — Nifty -0.41%, Bank Nifty -1.17%, PSU Banks -2.53% weak; offset by IT +1.42% and Pharma +0.15%. VIX +1.62% to 16.89 indicates rising uncertainty. However, individual portfolio names are seeing strong post-Q4 moves (PNBHOUSING +4%, COFORGE +17%, MARICO +3.3%, POLYCAB +9%, BAJAJ-AUTO +6.7%, BHARATFORG +6.2%). Focus is portfolio management — trail SLs aggressively on winners, hold losers within budget. 46 minutes to close — no new MIS, limited new CNC.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL 1068.30 is already at +8.6% above entry (locking ~₹6,744 of the ₹8,504 unrealized gain). CMP 1083.60, SL 1068.30 = 1.4% gap, slightly tight but the position is comfortably protected. No-op MODIFY check: SL/target unchanged from stored values; switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1068.30 already locks ₹6,744 of ₹8,504 unrealized gain (+10.8%). CMP 1083.60 — gap to SL ~1.4%, on the tight side but acceptable; further trail would force-exit on normal noise (Rule 14d). Q4 thesis intact; let the runner go to target 1135 or trip SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -0.7%, well within SL 121.00. Gold up +1.66% today on geopolitical bid. Hold as portfolio defensive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% unrealized at CMP 834. Q4 PAT +18%, MOFSL TP 950, FMCG sector strong. Trail SL from 820 (entry/breakeven) to 825 — locks small gain, gap to CMP 1.05% (above 1% floor). Target 855 unchanged. R:R from CMP: (855-834)/(834-825)=2.3, healthy."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1341.52 already locks +6.6% above entry 1259. CMP 1366.20, gap 1.8% — within tolerance. Q4 huge beat, +17% today, but MACD shows bearish histogram meaning this is the post-results pop, not a fresh leg. Holding stored SL/target — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1341.52 locks ~₹2,475 of ₹3,258 unrealized; gap to CMP 1.8% — within 1% floor. Target 1420 ~4% away. Encora deal + FY27 margin guidance >20.5% supports holding to target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% at CMP 3048.60, SL 3000 = -0.8%, gap 1.6%. Defense thesis intact, Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1. SL placement appropriate — let it work to target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 825 already at +2.4% above entry 806; CMP 838, gap 1.55%. No-op check: stored values match. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4% unrealized, SL 825 already locks ₹475 above entry, gap to CMP 1.55%. Q4 strong, AUM share 67%. Hold to target 875 (+4.4% upside from CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6% small drawdown. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps. SL 1465 (-1.7% from entry) intact. Hold within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, SL 1580 (-2.3% from entry). Massive Q4 turnaround (+317% PAT), 11.8x volume on entry day. Holding within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% just entered. SL 2755 (-1.1%). Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 +46.7%, refrigerant capex Rs 2,300 cr. Hold to target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% just entered. SL 9020 (-0.9%) — slightly tight on a high-priced name; chart at 52w high zone, room to run. Q4 record print, market share gain to 30-31%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% drawdown after Q4 PAT -17% YoY (Labour Codes one-time). Defense order book Rs 10,961 Cr supportive but US Class 8 truck cycle weakening. SL 1955 (-3% from entry) intact — let it decide."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% breakeven. SL 354 (-2.9%). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie TP 415. Hold to target 384."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2% just entered. Q4 record PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 (16% premium to CMP), Rs 150 dividend. SL 10440 (-3%) intact — buyback floor provides downside support. Hold to target 11260."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already locks +8.6% gain above entry; further tighten would risk noise stopout (Rule 14d). Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, gold tailwind on geopolitics."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 820 (entry) to 825 — small lock, gap 1.05% above 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +6.6%; gap 1.8% to CMP, appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "SL placement intact; defense thesis live."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +2.4% above entry; locks gain, gap 1.55%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "Within risk budget; Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround thesis intact, within SL budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, breakout intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Within SL budget; defense buffer offsets US CV concerns."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, NBFC sector intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 provides downside cushion."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups today (NUVAMA +20%, COFORGE +17%, POLYCAB +9%, SRF +10%, PIDILITIND +8.7%) — but most are extended single-session moves at 52w high zone. NUVAMA (Q4 board meeting May 11, T-3 sessions) blocked by Rule 11 binary-event discipline. PERSISTENT/THERMAX/LAURUSLABS/DABUR/GABRIEL/RAMCOCEM/NBCC/FINCABLES/APOLLOTYRE — chase risk into a -0.4% Nifty / -1.2% Bank Nifty tape with VIX rising; 46 min to close means any new CNC entry takes overnight tape gap-risk for marginal benefit. Existing book already has 13 CNC positions (61% deployed) covering FMCG, Pharma, IT, Capital Goods, Defense, Chemicals, Financial Services — fresh adds today would stack same-cluster exposure (Capital Goods has POLYCAB + GRSE + BHARATFORG already; Financial Services has PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL). LAURUSLABS BUY @1226 and DABUR BUY @487 are still OPEN from earlier — let them work or expire. Cancelling HFCL BUY @133.50 MIS — placed 3476m ago (multi-session-old MIS limit), thesis stale, MIS limits should not survive sessions.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 61%, cash 39% — slightly below soft 80% target but acceptable given (a) 13 active CNC positions already, (b) 2 OPEN BUY orders that if filled add another ~₹39K, (c) late-session timing with VIX rising. Today's unrealized +1.35% is healthy; primary discipline is NOT to chase late-session breakouts that add overnight gap risk. Cleaning OPEN order book by cancelling stale HFCL MIS limit. Tomorrow's session will have full intraday horizon to evaluate fresh entries if pullbacks materialize.",
  "decisions_addendum_note": "Adding HFCL cancellation as separate decision."
}
